name: @jfs/cache-kit
description: Shared, dependency-free client-side storage/cache primitives (safe localStorage wrappers, JSON snapshots with TTL, quota-aware multi-key saves, and an IndexedDB-backed store with an in-memory mirror, structuredClone isolation, soft TTLs and legacy-localStorage migration) extracted from the JFS family of buildless static sites.
author: jsvolos63
